mapper.select: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.getJejuPointList */ SELECT A.PARTNER_ID , B.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS MEMBER_CI , SUM(NVL(A.REQ_POINT, 0)) AS POINT , SUM(NVL(A.REQ_POINT, 0)) AS AMOUNT FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X','F') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.PARTNER_ID, B.SELF_CSTMR_CI
mapper.insert: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertJejuPointList */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_JEJUAIR_01 (BILL_YM , MEMBER_CI , POINT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') , B.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS MEMBER_CI , SUM(NVL(A.REQ_POINT, 0)) AS AMOUNT , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X','F') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.PARTNER_ID, B.SELF_CSTMR_CI
mapper.select: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.getGiftiPointList */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , CTN , POINT , USG_YM FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , A.USG_YM FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, A.USG_YM ) WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.insert: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertGiftiPointList */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_GIFTI_01 (LINK_YM , USG_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , CTN , POINT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS LINK_YM , USG_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , CTN , POINT , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT A.USG_YM , A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, A.USG_YM ) WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.select: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.getTmoneyPointList */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , UICC , CTN , POINT , BILL_YM FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.ICC_ID AS UICC , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , A.BILL_YM FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.BILL_YM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, B.ICC_ID ) WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.insert: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertTmoneyPointList */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_TMONEY_01 (LINK_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , UICC , CTN , POINT , BILL_YM , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS BILL_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , UICC , CTN , POINT , BILL_YM , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.ICC_ID AS UICC , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , A.BILL_YM FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.BILL_YM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, B.ICC_ID ) WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.select: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.getGooglePlayPointList */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , UICC , CTN , SVC_TYPE , SVC_CD , POINT , BILL_YM , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') LINK_YM FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.ICC_ID AS UICC , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , CASE WHEN (SELECT '1' FROM MSP_PARTNER_ADD_SVC_MST WHERE PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND ADD_SVC_CD = A.RATE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1 ) = '1' THEN '1' WHEN (SELECT '2' FROM MSP_PARTNER_PRMT_MST WHERE PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND PRMT_ID = A.RATE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1 ) = '2' THEN '2' ELSE '0' END AS SVC_TYPE , A.RATE_CD AS SVC_CD , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , A.BILL_YM FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' /* AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' */ AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.BILL_YM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, B.ICC_ID, A.RATE_CD ) B WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.insert: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertGooglePlayPointList */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_GOOGLEPLAY_01 (LINK_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , UICC , CTN , SVC_TYPE , SVC_CD , POINT , BILL_YM , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS LINK_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , UICC , CTN , SVC_TYPE , SVC_CD , POINT , BILL_YM , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.ICC_ID AS UICC , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , CASE WHEN (SELECT '1' FROM MSP_PARTNER_ADD_SVC_MST WHERE PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND ADD_SVC_CD = A.RATE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1 ) = '1' THEN '1' WHEN (SELECT '2' FROM MSP_PARTNER_PRMT_MST WHERE PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND PRMT_ID = A.RATE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1 ) = '2' THEN '2' ELSE '0' END AS SVC_TYPE , A.RATE_CD AS SVC_CD , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , A.BILL_YM FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' /* AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' */ AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.BILL_YM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, B.ICC_ID, A.RATE_CD ) B WHERE POINT > 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_PARTNER_GOOGLEPLAY_01 A WHERE A.LINK_YM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.UICC = B.UICC AND A.CTN = B.CTN AND A.SVC_TYPE = B.SVC_TYPE AND A.SVC_CD = B.SVC_CD AND A.BILL_YM = B.BILL_YM )

/** partnerPointSettleMapper.insertPointFile */ MERGE INTO MSP_PARTNER_POINT_FILE T USING ( SELECT #{partnerId} PARTNER_ID , #{fileNm} FILE_NM , #{localUpDir} LOCAL_UP_DIR , #{localDownDir} LOCAL_DOWN_DIR , #{hostUpDir} HOST_UP_DIR , #{hostDownDir} HOST_DOWN_DIR , NVL(#{sendFlag},'R') SEND_FLAG , NVL(#{sendResult},'R') SEND_RESULT , 'POINT' REGST_ID FROM DUAL ) D ON (T.PARTNER_ID = D.PARTNER_ID AND T.FILE_NM = D.FILE_NM ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET SEND_FLAG = D.SEND_FLAG ,SEND_RESULT = D.SEND_RESULT ,REGST_DTTM = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( PARTNER_ID , FILE_NM , LOCAL_UP_DIR , LOCAL_DOWN_DIR , HOST_UP_DIR , HOST_DOWN_DIR , SEND_FLAG , SEND_RESULT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) VALUES ( D.PARTNER_ID , D.FILE_NM , D.LOCAL_UP_DIR , D.LOCAL_DOWN_DIR , D.HOST_UP_DIR , D.HOST_DOWN_DIR , D.SEND_FLAG , D.SEND_RESULT , D.REGST_ID , SYSDATE )
mapper.select: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.getLPointList */ SELECT A.PARTNER_ID , A.BILL_YM , A.CUSTOMER_ID , B.SELF_CSTMR_CI , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS REQ_POINT FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.PARTNER_ID, A.BILL_YM, A.CUSTOMER_ID, B.SELF_CSTMR_CI

/* partnerPointSettleMapper."getLPointPrmList" */
SELECT BPD.BILL_YM , JSI.CUSTOMER_ID , JCI.SELF_CSTMR_CI , SUM( CASE WHEN BPD.PYMN_CD IN ('INV', 'ADJR') THEN NVL(BPD.PYMN_AMNT, 0) + NVL(BPD.VAT_AMNT, 0) WHEN BPD.PYMN_CD IN ('ADJ') THEN (NVL(BPD.PYMN_AMNT, 0) + NVL(BPD.VAT_AMNT, 0)) * -1 ELSE 0 END) AS INV_AMNT FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA BPD , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO JCI , MSP_PARTNER_USIM_MST PUM , MSP_REQUEST_DTL DTL , MSP_RATE_MST MRM WHERE BPD.SVC_CNTR_NO = JSI.SVC_CNTR_NO AND JSI.CUSTOMER_ID = JCI.CUSTOMER_ID AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM NOT IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0067') AND JSI.SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND BPD.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') AND JSI.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM')||'01' AND TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2)), 'YYYYMMDD') AND PUM.ORGN_ID IN ('V000017488','V000014815','V000001444','NZA0000240') -- 대상유심접점 AND DTL.FST_USIM_NO = PUM.USIM_NO AND JCI.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL AND MRM.RATE_TYPE IN ('00','02') AND MRM.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND MRM.PAY_CL_CD = 'PO' AND MRM.RATE_CD NOT IN ('KISOPMDSB','KISSTD350','KISSTD700','KISOC2GBA','KISOC2GBB','KISOC9GBA','KISOC9GBB','KISLTE45M') AND DTL.FST_RATE_CD = MRM.RATE_CD GROUP BY BPD.BILL_YM, JSI.CUSTOMER_ID, JCI.SELF_CSTMR_CI
mapper.insert: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertLPointList */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_LPOINT_01 ( LINK_YM , BILL_YM , CUSTOMER_ID , CI , REQ_POINT , INV_AMT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS LINK_YM , A.BILL_YM , A.CUSTOMER_ID , B.SELF_CSTMR_CI , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS REQ_POINT , SUM(A.INV_AMT) AS INV_AMT , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.PARTNER_ID, A.BILL_YM, A.CUSTOMER_ID, B.SELF_CSTMR_CI

/* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertLPointPrmList */
INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_LPOINT_02 ( LINK_YM , BILL_YM , CUSTOMER_ID , CI , REQ_POINT , INV_AMT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS LINK_YM , A.BILL_YM , A.CUSTOMER_ID , A.SELF_CSTMR_CI , '2000' , A.INV_AMNT , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT BPD.BILL_YM , JSI.CUSTOMER_ID , JCI.SELF_CSTMR_CI , SUM( CASE WHEN BPD.PYMN_CD IN ('INV', 'ADJR') THEN NVL(BPD.PYMN_AMNT, 0) + NVL(BPD.VAT_AMNT, 0) WHEN BPD.PYMN_CD IN ('ADJ') THEN (NVL(BPD.PYMN_AMNT, 0) + NVL(BPD.VAT_AMNT, 0)) * -1 ELSE 0 END) AS INV_AMNT FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA BPD , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO JCI , MSP_PARTNER_USIM_MST PUM , MSP_REQUEST_DTL DTL , MSP_RATE_MST MRM WHERE BPD.SVC_CNTR_NO = JSI.SVC_CNTR_NO AND JSI.CUSTOMER_ID = JCI.CUSTOMER_ID AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM NOT IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0067') AND JSI.SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND BPD.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') AND JSI.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM')||'01' AND TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2)), 'YYYYMMDD') -- 개통일 기준 AND PUM.ORGN_ID IN ('V000017488','V000014815','V000001444','NZA0000240') -- 대상유심접점 AND DTL.FST_USIM_NO = PUM.USIM_NO AND JCI.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL AND MRM.RATE_TYPE IN ('00','02') AND MRM.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND MRM.PAY_CL_CD = 'PO' AND MRM.RATE_CD NOT IN ('KISOPMDSB','KISSTD350','KISSTD700','KISOC2GBA','KISOC2GBB','KISOC9GBA','KISOC9GBB','KISLTE45M') AND DTL.FST_RATE_CD = MRM.RATE_CD GROUP BY BPD.BILL_YM, JSI.CUSTOMER_ID, JCI.SELF_CSTMR_CI ) A

/* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertLpointInterface */ INSERT INTO MSP_LPOINT_INTERFACE ( LINK_YM , DATA_01 , DATA_02 , DATA_03 , DATA_04 , DATA_05 , DATA_06 , DATA_07 , DATA_08 , DATA_09 , DATA_10 , DATA_11 , DATA_12 , DATA_13 , DATA_14 , DATA_15 , DATA_16 , DATA_17 , DATA_18 , DATA_19 , DATA_20 , DATA_21 , DATA_22 , DATA_23 , DATA_24 , DATA_25 , DATA_26 , DATA_27 , DATA_28 , DATA_29 , DATA_30 , DATA_31 , DATA_32 , DATA_33 , DATA_34 , DATA_35 , DATA_36 , DATA_37 , DATA_38 , DATA_39 , DATA_40 , DATA_41 , DATA_42 , DATA_43 , DATA_44 , DATA_45 , DATA_46 , DATA_47 , DATA_48 , DATA_49 , DATA_50 , DATA_51 , DATA_52 , DATA_53 , DATA_54 , DATA_55 , DATA_56 , DATA_57 , DATA_58 , DATA_59 , DATA_60 , DATA_61 , DATA_62 , DATA_63 , DATA_64 , DATA_65 , DATA_66 , DATA_67 , DATA_68 , DATA_69 , DATA_70 , DATA_71 , DATA_72 , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') , 'BD' /* 01.자료구분 */ , '6' /* 02.승인요청방식 */ , ' ' /* 03.고객식별구분코드 */ , RPAD(' ', 37, ' ') /* 04.카드번호 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 05.고객식별값 */ , RPAD(#{partnerId}, 10, ' ') /* 06.제휴가맹점번호 */ , RPAD(A.CUSTOMER_ID, 19, ' ') /* 07.제휴사승인번호, 거래일기준 고유 번호, M모바일 고객ID */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 08.거래일자 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') /* 09.거래시간 */ , '10' /* 10.거래구분 */ , '100' /* 11.거래사유 */ , '1' /* 12.적립구분 */ , '9' /* 13.거래요청방식구분코드 */ , '2' /* 14.포인트적립구분코드 */ --, LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 15.총매출금액 */ , LPAD(SUM(A.INV_AMT), 12, 0) /* 15.청구금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 16.포인트대상금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 17.현금매출금액 */ -- , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 18.신용카드매출금액 */ , LPAD(SUM(A.INV_AMT), 12, 0) /* 18.신용카드매출금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 19.상품권매출금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 20.포인트매출금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 21.기타매출금액 */ , LPAD(SUM(A.REQ_POINT), 9, 0) /* 22.총생성포인트 */ , LPAD(0, 9, 0) /* 23.금회생성포인트(현금) */ , LPAD(0, 9, 0) /* 24.금회생성포인트(카드) */ , LPAD(0, 9, 0) /* 25.금회생성포인트(상품권) */ , LPAD(0, 9, 0) /* 26.금회생성포인트(포인트) */ , LPAD(SUM(A.REQ_POINT), 9, 0) /* 27.금회생성포인트(기타) */ , LPAD(' ', 4, ' ') /* 28.쿠폰번호 */ , ' ' /* 29.반품구분 */ , ' ' /* 30.원거래정보유무 */ , ' ' /* 31.원거래정보구분 */ , RPAD(' ', 19, ' ') /* 32.원거래승인번호 */ , RPAD(' ', 8, ' ') /* 33.원거래일자 */ , RPAD(' ', 40, ' ') /* 34.거래요청정보 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 35.결제카드번호1 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 36.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 37.결제카드번호2 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 38.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 39.결제카드번호3 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 40.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 41.결제카드번호4 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 42.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 43.결제카드번호5 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 44.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 45.결제카드번호6 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 46.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 47.결제카드번호7 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 48.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 49.결제카드번호8 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 50.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 51.결제카드번호9 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 52.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 10, ' ') /* 53.이벤트코드1 */ , RPAD(' ', 100, ' ') /* 54.이벤트명 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 55.이벤트매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 56.이벤트생성포인트 */ , RPAD(' ', 2, ' ') /* 57.유효기간 */ , RPAD(' ', 10, ' ') /* 58.이벤트코드2 */ , RPAD(' ', 100, ' ') /* 59.이벤트명 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 60.이벤트매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 61.이벤트생성포인트 */ , RPAD(' ', 2, ' ') /* 62.유효기간 */ , RPAD(' ', 10, ' ') /* 63.엘포인트고객번호 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 64.엘포인트승인번호 */ , RPAD(' ', 8, ' ') /* 65.엘포인트승인일자 */ , RPAD(' ', 6, ' ') /* 66.엘포인트승인시간 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 67.생성포인트 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 68.이벤트포인트 */ , RPAD(' ', 2, ' ') /* 69.응답코드 */ , RPAD(' ', 64, ' ') /* 70.응답메세지 */ , RPAD(A.CI, 88, ' ') /* 71.CI */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 72.FILLER */ , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_PARTNER_LPOINT_01 A WHERE LINK_YM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY CUSTOMER_ID, CI

/* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertLpointPrmInterface */ INSERT INTO MSP_LPOINT_PRM_INTERFACE ( LINK_YM , DATA_01 , DATA_02 , DATA_03 , DATA_04 , DATA_05 , DATA_06 , DATA_07 , DATA_08 , DATA_09 , DATA_10 , DATA_11 , DATA_12 , DATA_13 , DATA_14 , DATA_15 , DATA_16 , DATA_17 , DATA_18 , DATA_19 , DATA_20 , DATA_21 , DATA_22 , DATA_23 , DATA_24 , DATA_25 , DATA_26 , DATA_27 , DATA_28 , DATA_29 , DATA_30 , DATA_31 , DATA_32 , DATA_33 , DATA_34 , DATA_35 , DATA_36 , DATA_37 , DATA_38 , DATA_39 , DATA_40 , DATA_41 , DATA_42 , DATA_43 , DATA_44 , DATA_45 , DATA_46 , DATA_47 , DATA_48 , DATA_49 , DATA_50 , DATA_51 , DATA_52 , DATA_53 , DATA_54 , DATA_55 , DATA_56 , DATA_57 , DATA_58 , DATA_59 , DATA_60 , DATA_61 , DATA_62 , DATA_63 , DATA_64 , DATA_65 , DATA_66 , DATA_67 , DATA_68 , DATA_69 , DATA_70 , DATA_71 , DATA_72 , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') , 'BD' /* 01.자료구분 */ , '6' /* 02.승인요청방식 */ , ' ' /* 03.고객식별구분코드 */ , RPAD(' ', 37, ' ') /* 04.카드번호 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 05.고객식별값 */ , RPAD(#{partnerId}, 10, ' ') /* 06.제휴가맹점번호 */ , RPAD(A.CUSTOMER_ID, 19, ' ') /* 07.제휴사승인번호, 거래일기준 고유 번호, M모바일 고객ID */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 08.거래일자 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') /* 09.거래시간 */ , '10' /* 10.거래구분 */ , '100' /* 11.거래사유 */ , '1' /* 12.적립구분 */ , '9' /* 13.거래요청방식구분코드 */ , '2' /* 14.포인트적립구분코드 */ --, LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 15.총매출금액 */ , LPAD(SUM(A.INV_AMT), 12, 0) /* 15.청구금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 16.포인트대상금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 17.현금매출금액 */ -- , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 18.신용카드매출금액 */ , LPAD(SUM(A.INV_AMT), 12, 0) /* 18.신용카드매출금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 19.상품권매출금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 20.포인트매출금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 21.기타매출금액 */ , LPAD(SUM(A.REQ_POINT), 9, 0) /* 22.총생성포인트 */ , LPAD(0, 9, 0) /* 23.금회생성포인트(현금) */ , LPAD(0, 9, 0) /* 24.금회생성포인트(카드) */ , LPAD(0, 9, 0) /* 25.금회생성포인트(상품권) */ , LPAD(0, 9, 0) /* 26.금회생성포인트(포인트) */ , LPAD(SUM(A.REQ_POINT), 9, 0) /* 27.금회생성포인트(기타) */ , LPAD(' ', 4, ' ') /* 28.쿠폰번호 */ , ' ' /* 29.반품구분 */ , ' ' /* 30.원거래정보유무 */ , ' ' /* 31.원거래정보구분 */ , RPAD(' ', 19, ' ') /* 32.원거래승인번호 */ , RPAD(' ', 8, ' ') /* 33.원거래일자 */ , RPAD(' ', 40, ' ') /* 34.거래요청정보 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 35.결제카드번호1 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 36.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 37.결제카드번호2 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 38.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 39.결제카드번호3 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 40.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 41.결제카드번호4 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 42.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 43.결제카드번호5 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 44.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 45.결제카드번호6 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 46.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 47.결제카드번호7 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 48.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 49.결제카드번호8 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 50.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 51.결제카드번호9 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 52.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 10, ' ') /* 53.이벤트코드1 */ , RPAD(' ', 100, ' ') /* 54.이벤트명 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 55.이벤트매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 56.이벤트생성포인트 */ , RPAD(' ', 2, ' ') /* 57.유효기간 */ , RPAD(' ', 10, ' ') /* 58.이벤트코드2 */ , RPAD(' ', 100, ' ') /* 59.이벤트명 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 60.이벤트매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 61.이벤트생성포인트 */ , RPAD(' ', 2, ' ') /* 62.유효기간 */ , RPAD(' ', 10, ' ') /* 63.엘포인트고객번호 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 64.엘포인트승인번호 */ , RPAD(' ', 8, ' ') /* 65.엘포인트승인일자 */ , RPAD(' ', 6, ' ') /* 66.엘포인트승인시간 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 67.생성포인트 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 68.이벤트포인트 */ , RPAD(' ', 2, ' ') /* 69.응답코드 */ , RPAD(' ', 64, ' ') /* 70.응답메세지 */ , RPAD(A.CI, 88, ' ') /* 71.CI */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 72.FILLER */ , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_PARTNER_LPOINT_02 A WHERE LINK_YM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY CUSTOMER_ID, CI
mapper.select: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.getLPointReqHeader */ SELECT 'BH' /* 01.자료구분 */ || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 02.작업일자 */ || 'O940' /* 03.전문번호 */ || RPAD('O620', 4, ' ') /* 04.기관코드 */ || RPAD(' ', 1077, ' ') /* 05.FILLER */ AS HEADER_STR FROM DUAL

/* partnerPointSettleMapper.getLPointReqBody */ SELECT A.DATA_01 /* 01.자료구분 */ || A.DATA_02 /* 02.승인요청방식 */ || A.DATA_03 /* 03.고객식별구분코드 */ || A.DATA_04 /* 04.카드번호 */ || A.DATA_05 /* 05.고객식별값 */ || A.DATA_06 /* 06.제휴가맹점번호 */ || A.DATA_07 /* 07.제휴사승인번호, 거래일기준 고유 번호, M모바일 고객ID */ || A.DATA_08 /* 08.거래일자 */ || A.DATA_09 /* 09.거래시간 */ || A.DATA_10 /* 10.거래구분 */ || A.DATA_11 /* 11.거래사유 */ || A.DATA_12 /* 12.적립구분 */ || A.DATA_13 /* 13.거래요청방식구분코드 */ || A.DATA_14 /* 14.포인트적립구분코드 */ || A.DATA_15 /* 15.청구금액 */ || A.DATA_16 /* 16.포인트대상금액 */ || A.DATA_17 /* 17.현금매출금액 */ || A.DATA_18 /* 18.신용카드매출금액 */ || A.DATA_19 /* 19.상품권매출금액 */ || A.DATA_20 /* 20.포인트매출금액 */ || A.DATA_21 /* 21.기타매출금액 */ || A.DATA_22 /* 22.총생성포인트 */ || A.DATA_23 /* 23.금회생성포인트(현금) */ || A.DATA_24 /* 24.금회생성포인트(카드) */ || A.DATA_25 /* 25.금회생성포인트(상품권) */ || A.DATA_26 /* 26.금회생성포인트(포인트) */ || A.DATA_27 /* 27.금회생성포인트(기타) */ || A.DATA_28 /* 28.쿠폰번호 */ || A.DATA_29 /* 29.반품구분 */ || A.DATA_30 /* 30.원거래정보유무 */ || A.DATA_31 /* 31.원거래정보구분 */ || A.DATA_32 /* 32.원거래승인번호 */ || A.DATA_33 /* 33.원거래일자 */ || A.DATA_34 /* 34.거래요청정보 */ || A.DATA_35 /* 35.결제카드번호1 */ || A.DATA_36 /* 36.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_37 /* 37.결제카드번호2 */ || A.DATA_38 /* 38.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_39 /* 39.결제카드번호3 */ || A.DATA_40 /* 40.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_41 /* 41.결제카드번호4 */ || A.DATA_42 /* 42.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_43 /* 43.결제카드번호5 */ || A.DATA_44 /* 44.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_45 /* 45.결제카드번호6 */ || A.DATA_46 /* 46.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_47 /* 47.결제카드번호7 */ || A.DATA_48 /* 48.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_49 /* 49.결제카드번호8 */ || A.DATA_50 /* 50.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_51 /* 51.결제카드번호9 */ || A.DATA_52 /* 52.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_53 /* 53.이벤트코드1 */ || A.DATA_54 /* 54.이벤트명 */ || A.DATA_55 /* 55.이벤트매출금액 */ || A.DATA_56 /* 56.이벤트생성포인트 */ || A.DATA_57 /* 57.유효기간 */ || A.DATA_58 /* 58.이벤트코드2 */ || A.DATA_59 /* 59.이벤트명 */ || A.DATA_60 /* 60.이벤트매출금액 */ || A.DATA_61 /* 61.이벤트생성포인트 */ || A.DATA_62 /* 62.유효기간 */ || A.DATA_63 /* 63.엘포인트고객번호 */ || A.DATA_64 /* 64.엘포인트승인번호 */ || A.DATA_65 /* 65.엘포인트승인일자 */ || A.DATA_66 /* 66.엘포인트승인시간 */ || A.DATA_67 /* 67.생성포인트 */ || A.DATA_68 /* 68.이벤트포인트 */ || A.DATA_69 /* 69.응답코드 */ || A.DATA_70 /* 70.응답메세지 */ || A.DATA_71 /* 71.CI */ || A.DATA_72 /* 72.FILLER */ AS BODY_STR FROM MSP_LPOINT_INTERFACE A WHERE A.LINK_YM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')

/* partnerPointSettleMapper.getLPointPrmReqBody */ SELECT A.DATA_01 /* 01.자료구분 */ || A.DATA_02 /* 02.승인요청방식 */ || A.DATA_03 /* 03.고객식별구분코드 */ || A.DATA_04 /* 04.카드번호 */ || A.DATA_05 /* 05.고객식별값 */ || A.DATA_06 /* 06.제휴가맹점번호 */ || A.DATA_07 /* 07.제휴사승인번호, 거래일기준 고유 번호, M모바일 고객ID */ || A.DATA_08 /* 08.거래일자 */ || A.DATA_09 /* 09.거래시간 */ || A.DATA_10 /* 10.거래구분 */ || A.DATA_11 /* 11.거래사유 */ || A.DATA_12 /* 12.적립구분 */ || A.DATA_13 /* 13.거래요청방식구분코드 */ || A.DATA_14 /* 14.포인트적립구분코드 */ || A.DATA_15 /* 15.청구금액 */ || A.DATA_16 /* 16.포인트대상금액 */ || A.DATA_17 /* 17.현금매출금액 */ || A.DATA_18 /* 18.신용카드매출금액 */ || A.DATA_19 /* 19.상품권매출금액 */ || A.DATA_20 /* 20.포인트매출금액 */ || A.DATA_21 /* 21.기타매출금액 */ || A.DATA_22 /* 22.총생성포인트 */ || A.DATA_23 /* 23.금회생성포인트(현금) */ || A.DATA_24 /* 24.금회생성포인트(카드) */ || A.DATA_25 /* 25.금회생성포인트(상품권) */ || A.DATA_26 /* 26.금회생성포인트(포인트) */ || A.DATA_27 /* 27.금회생성포인트(기타) */ || A.DATA_28 /* 28.쿠폰번호 */ || A.DATA_29 /* 29.반품구분 */ || A.DATA_30 /* 30.원거래정보유무 */ || A.DATA_31 /* 31.원거래정보구분 */ || A.DATA_32 /* 32.원거래승인번호 */ || A.DATA_33 /* 33.원거래일자 */ || A.DATA_34 /* 34.거래요청정보 */ || A.DATA_35 /* 35.결제카드번호1 */ || A.DATA_36 /* 36.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_37 /* 37.결제카드번호2 */ || A.DATA_38 /* 38.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_39 /* 39.결제카드번호3 */ || A.DATA_40 /* 40.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_41 /* 41.결제카드번호4 */ || A.DATA_42 /* 42.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_43 /* 43.결제카드번호5 */ || A.DATA_44 /* 44.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_45 /* 45.결제카드번호6 */ || A.DATA_46 /* 46.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_47 /* 47.결제카드번호7 */ || A.DATA_48 /* 48.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_49 /* 49.결제카드번호8 */ || A.DATA_50 /* 50.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_51 /* 51.결제카드번호9 */ || A.DATA_52 /* 52.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_53 /* 53.이벤트코드1 */ || A.DATA_54 /* 54.이벤트명 */ || A.DATA_55 /* 55.이벤트매출금액 */ || A.DATA_56 /* 56.이벤트생성포인트 */ || A.DATA_57 /* 57.유효기간 */ || A.DATA_58 /* 58.이벤트코드2 */ || A.DATA_59 /* 59.이벤트명 */ || A.DATA_60 /* 60.이벤트매출금액 */ || A.DATA_61 /* 61.이벤트생성포인트 */ || A.DATA_62 /* 62.유효기간 */ || A.DATA_63 /* 63.엘포인트고객번호 */ || A.DATA_64 /* 64.엘포인트승인번호 */ || A.DATA_65 /* 65.엘포인트승인일자 */ || A.DATA_66 /* 66.엘포인트승인시간 */ || A.DATA_67 /* 67.생성포인트 */ || A.DATA_68 /* 68.이벤트포인트 */ || A.DATA_69 /* 69.응답코드 */ || A.DATA_70 /* 70.응답메세지 */ || A.DATA_71 /* 71.CI */ || A.DATA_72 /* 72.FILLER */ AS BODY_STR FROM MSP_LPOINT_PRM_INTERFACE A WHERE A.LINK_YM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')

/* partnerPointSettleMapper.getLPointReqTrailer */ SELECT 'BT' /* 01.자료구분 */ || LPAD(NVL((SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(1) OVER() FROM MSP_PARTNER_LPOINT_01 WHERE LINK_YM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY CUSTOMER_ID, CI), 0), 9, 0) /* 02.자료건수 */ || RPAD(' ', 1084, ' ') /* 03.FILLER */ AS TRAILER_STR FROM DUAL

/* partnerPointSettleMapper.getLPointPrmReqTrailer */ SELECT 'BT' /* 01.자료구분 */ || LPAD(NVL((SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(1) OVER() FROM MSP_PARTNER_LPOINT_02 WHERE LINK_YM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY CUSTOMER_ID, CI), 0), 9, 0) /* 02.자료건수 */ || RPAD(' ', 1084, ' ') /* 03.FILLER */ AS TRAILER_STR FROM DUAL
